paragraphs.en: You asked me to develop ideas for a new brand strategy. As a reminder, this is the messaging that we use at the moment: “If you want to boil water, you need a kettle. If you need a kettle, you want the Brewmaster. The fast, reliable and affordable way to make the perfect drink.” The positioning is practical, price-conscious and successful. But it is also unexciting. If we want to grow, we need to take a higher share of mind with a different sort of consumer.
paragraphs.zh: 你让我为一个新品牌战略提供想法。先提醒你一下，目前我们使用的这套表述是： “如果你想把水煮沸，就需要一把水壶。如果你需要水壶，你就会选择 Brewmaster。快速、可靠且价格实惠的完美饮品制作方式。” 这个定位务实、注重价格，而且很成功。但它也缺乏惊喜感。如果我们想要增长，就需要用不同类型的消费者来占据更高的心智占有率。

paragraphs.en: I have put some sample copy for each positioning strategy below, and taken the liberty of adapting the product name and stressing planned new features where that feels appropriate. I look forward to hearing your comments when we meet in a couple of weeks.
paragraphs.zh: 我在每种定位策略下面都给出了一些示例文案，并在合适的时候擅自调整了产品名称，同时强调了计划中的新功能。我们几周后见面时，期待听到你的反馈。

paragraphs.en: Luxury. Water is the wellspring of life, the faint promise of evolution, the pulsing aquifer of quintessence. Water is the bringer of dreams, fragile and precious. Water is the mark of organisms taking shape, of mighty civilisations marching through the centuries, of the search for habitable planets in distant galaxies. And here on Earth, water is the source of profound moments of human connection. The Eau Chaud is an idea more than it is an object. You never own a kettle. You merely look after it until the next conversation.
paragraphs.zh: 奢华。水是生命的源泉，是演化的微光，是精华的脉动脉搏。水是梦想的使者，脆弱而珍贵。水是生物成形的印记，是伟大文明跨越世纪的轨迹，是在遥远星系中寻找适居星球的征途。而在地球上，水更是人类深刻联结时刻的源头。Eau Chaud 更多是一个理念，而不只是一件物品。你并不真正拥有一把水壶，只是在下一次对话到来之前照顾它。

paragraphs.en: Premium, design-led. You would know it by its silhouette alone. The unmistakable spout-and-handle shape of the Kettöl adds lustre to every kitchen. Its muted tones ensure that it blends with every aesthetic choice. The mid-century-inspired design features a classic plug and cable, which connects to a perfectly rounded base station. Brushed steel surrounds a transparent water indicator with stylised pictures of cups, so you always know how full the Kettöl is. A warm blue light tells you that the kettle is on, as does the gently immersive sound of boiling. Once the kettle has boiled, it can be lifted from the base station by using a laminated blond-wood handle and taken directly to your waiting cups. And so on.
paragraphs.zh: 高端、以设计为先。只看它的轮廓就能认出来。Kettöl 独特的壶嘴与把手轮廓为每个厨房都增添了光泽。它的低饱和色调确保可以与任何审美风格和谐共处。受到中世纪风格启发的设计采用经典的插头和线缆，连接到一个圆润的底座。拉丝钢包围着一个透明水位指示窗，上面有杯子造型的图案，让你始终清楚 Kettöl 里的水位。温暖的蓝色指示灯会告诉你水壶正在加热，轻柔而沉浸的沸腾声也会提示你这一点。待水沸腾后，你可以用覆膜的淡木色木柄把它从底座提起，直接拿去放在等候中的杯子里。诸如此类。

paragraphs.en: For early adopters. The KetGPT takes the kettle into the agentic era. At the front door and fancy a cup of tea? Just woken up and desperate for your first coffee? Get out your phone, fire up the KetGPT app, enter your login details and tell your kettle to start boiling. That’s not all. You can ask your kettle how the boiling process is going in text or voice mode, and it will reply. It will even send a notification to your phone when the boiling process is complete. You set the task. The KetGPT will take it from there, entirely autonomously. (Token costs not included.)
paragraphs.zh: 面向早期采用者。KetGPT 将水壶带入了“智能体时代”。在门口想喝杯茶？刚起床就急着喝第一杯咖啡？拿出你的手机，打开 KetGPT 应用，输入登录信息，并告诉你的水壶开始烧水。事情不止于此。你可以用文字或语音模式问它沸腾进度如何，它会回复。它甚至会在烧水完成时向你的手机发送通知。你只需下达任务，KetGPT 就会全权自动接手。（不含 Token 费用。）

paragraphs.en: Environmental. Introducing the Keco—for people who care. Our latest kettle is designed to retain heat, meaning that water is still tepid four hours after it has boiled. It runs on electricity. It can be recycled. A kettle should warm water, not the planet. (No children are involved in manufacturing of the Keco.)
paragraphs.zh: 环保。推出 Keco——为在乎的人打造。我们最新的水壶采用保温设计，意味着它在沸腾四小时后，水仍然是温热状态。它使用电力驱动，可以回收再利用。水壶应该温暖水，不该加热地球。（Keco 的生产过程中未涉及任何儿童。）

paragraphs.en: Gen Z. Enjoy some coastal grandma and eclectic grandpa core with the new Vintage kettle. For content creators who crave cosy-cottage vibes. [If we go down this route, I will really need some help. I talked to a few young people and they suggested these words, but none of it makes any sense.]
paragraphs.zh: Z 世代。享受这款 Vintage 水壶带来的“海边奶奶范”和“折衷爷爷核心”，适合想要温馨度假小屋氛围的内容创作者。[如果我们走这条路线，我真的需要很多帮助。我和几个年轻人聊过，他们给了这些词，但我觉得每一个都听不太懂。]

paragraphs.en: Heritage. The Stove Top has been warming water and hearts for well over 100 years. Still today, its comforting digital whistle marks the end of every boil, the start of every pour. Each Stove Top is assembled and put into its box by employees who have spent their lives around kettles. Our master kettlers live in an industrial heartland and some of them wear overalls. Anyone can make a hot drink. Only the Stove Top can make you feel part of history.
paragraphs.zh: 传承。Stove Top 已经温暖了超过 100 年的水与人心。直到今天，它安抚人心的数字口哨声都标志着每一轮沸腾结束、每一次倒水开始。每一台 Stove Top 都由与水壶打交道了大半辈子的员工装配并装盒。我们的资深“熬壶师”生活在工业重镇，其中一些人还穿着工装。任何人都能煮出一杯热饮，只有 Stove Top 能让你感到自己是历史的一部分。

paragraphs.en: Wellness. The Kato is a central part of your health and fitness regime. Its water-heating technology fits seamlessly into every nutrition plan, from turmeric lattes and bone broths to chicory coffees and matcha green teas. Our trained team of advisers is on hand 24 hours a day, seven days a week to answer your queries. Worried about the effect of steam on your breathing? Uncertain what all those flaky bits at the bottom are doing to your microbiome? The Kato is with you every step of the way on your journey to becoming a better you. (Comes with a small wearable sensor that tells you whether you are still alive.)
paragraphs.zh: 健康。Kato 是你健康与健身计划中的核心一环。它的加热技术可无缝融入任何营养方案，从姜黄拿铁、骨头汤到菊苣咖啡和抹茶绿茶。我们受训的顾问团队每周七天、每天 24 小时都在线，随时解答你的问题。担心蒸汽对呼吸的影响？不确定底部那些片状物在微生物群上到底在做什么？Kato 会在你追求更好自己的每一步陪伴你。（配有一枚小型可穿戴传感器，帮助你确认自己是否还活着。）

paragraphs.en: Populist. If scalding hot water and the risk of a burn do not scare you, buy the Boiler. A kettle for real patriots. Not suitable for herbal teas and other woke beverages. Used by veterans, among others. Made in this country, except for some essential components. ■
paragraphs.zh: 大众主义。若高温烫水和烫伤风险并不让你退缩，就买 Boiler。这是给真正爱国者的水壶。并不适用于草本茶和其他“觉醒”饮品。该产品被退伍军人等群体所使用。除了一些关键零部件外，全在本国制造。■

paragraphs.en: Step inside the world of work with our Bartleby newsletter. Each week our white-collar oracle muses on the agonies of office life.
paragraphs.zh: 走进职场世界，关注我们的 Bartleby 周刊。每周，我们的白领预言家都会思考办公室生活里的种种煎熬。
